creator: fazekas@nte.sk
text:
using ldconfig 32 on amd64 doesn't solve all the problems... (see also 
here http://www.nabble.com/hpacucli-on-fbsd7--td16382298.html)

Guys from HP, you should release 64bit binary of hpacucli, cause there's 
a lot of people using your products on BSD, i think... >:o


# ldconfig -32 -m /usr/local/lib/compaq/hpacucli

# uname -rsp
FreeBSD 7.1-PRERELEASE amd64
# hpacucli controller all show
